name: gutenberg
description: Verified tool factory for AI agents: generate CLI, MCP servers, agent skills, SQLite stores, scorecards, and web catalogs from APIs, GraphQL, HAR, curl, and websites.

scripts.sample:har: node bin/gutenberg.js import-har samples/simple.har.json --out generated/capture.openapi.json --name captured-api
scripts.sample:graphql: node bin/gutenberg.js import-graphql samples/github-introspection.json --out generated/github-graphql.openapi.json --name github-graphql
scripts.sample:generate: node bin/gutenberg.js generate samples/petstore-openapi.json --out generated/petstore-go --name petstore --force
